special_mechanics.name: Disciplines (Vampiric Powers)
special_mechanics.description: Enhanced physical abilities including speed and strength enhancement. Each discipline upgradeable up to 5 times, affecting duration, damage scale, and blood cost.

special_mechanics.name: Mist Form
special_mechanics.description: Transformation ability allowing character to turn into mist

special_mechanics.name: Invisibility
special_mechanics.description: Discipline to render character invisible for escape/evasion

special_mechanics.name: Teleportation
special_mechanics.description: Ability to teleport to a haven location

tier_notes: Tier 3: RPG game with emphasis on narrative and supernatural abilities rather than precise platforming physics. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantitative movement or physics parameters. Game is third-person perspective with mouse-click based interaction.
